body.title: Igor sees 'any thoughts?' as habit-didn't-spawn-reply signal — flags for sleep self-review
body.result: reply_gap_detector.py: 8 prod patterns, ring backtrack for unanswered user turns, EPISODIC deposit with needs_sleep_review. Wired in main.py after self-repair. TWM push on detection. 23 tests.
body.description: When Akien says 'any thoughts?' it means Igor stalled — a prior turn should have produced a reply or follow-up but didn't. Igor should: (1) detect this phrase pattern as a habit-failure signal, (2) flag the prior exchange for sleep-cycle review, (3) during sleep self-training, analyze what went wrong (pe_chain blocked? missing habit? scope guard stall?) and deposit a learning. This is a maintenance feedback loop that should happen automatically during sleep consolidation.
